title: How do I know which robot lawn mower I need? 5 questions to help you find the best bot for you
summary: One bot might be intelligent enough to handle a schedule where the lawnbot spends the morning in Zone A and moves to Zone B in the evening, and it might even be able to work out the optimal mowing patterns and cadence.
